reviews.review_description: We tested 10k Science with Meta Quest 3 for an educational VR activity on CRISPR. The app provides an engaging and immersive learning environment, and it is especially useful for helping students explore complex scientific concepts through virtual experience. We also appreciated the possibility of using a customized guide for our educational context. The support team was very helpful during the setup process. Overall, it is a valuable tool for science education and VR-based learning.

This is honestly one of the coolest educational apps on Meta Quest right now. The way it lets you dive into microscopic worlds and actually see how things work is something you just can't get from textbooks. The interactive Al guide makes it feel like you have a personal tutor in VR.

If they keep expanding this, it could be a game changer for learning science.

I would give it 5 stars cause I really do enjoy it! But considering you can only do ONE of the activities, I was disappointed with that! I hope they update and open more of the game so we can do more!!

developer_response.body: Thanks, we totally understand and are releasing new content very soon!! If you'd like to be one of the first to see the new experiences, email me at stephanie@dynamoid.com and I'll get you an invite to our Beta channel right away. :) Thank you! - Stephanie

reviews.review_description: I've always wondered what it would be like to shrink down to the size of a bug - now I know! This app is SO cool - you can dive into things to experience different scales, like the inside of a blood vessel or a plant. I feel like this would be a really great way to teach science concepts that are hard to learn by reading about.

cons
- made me nauseas (stuttering loading new scenes + zoom in, i have my vr legs)
- recordings give ample time to answer (give us a button to say we are ready to answer)
- when instructions are unclear, no way to figure out how to proceed. (add a button to repeat last instruction or give transcription).

It has a lot of potential but above are cardinal sins. Focus solely on quality of life improvements before doing anything else.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the critical feedback! We've made a lot of improvements since then and would love to hear what you think of the app as it is now! Feel free to email me if you'd like to see our newest Beta build - stephanie@dynamoid.com. Thank you! - Stephanie

reviews.review_description: This is a wonderful app to play when family come over and you want to show off what the Quest can do while learning. The controls are intuitive and easy to comprehend. I got to learn how Sickle Cell disease manifests and also learned how insects can damage plant life. The graphics are stunning and makes science education fun. I wish I had this at school.
I look forward to many more titles to explore. I will take as much CRISPR as you all see fit to create, but the locked titles also look interesting.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! Thanks so much!! We're so glad you enjoyed the CRISPR experience. We're excited to launch our new content VERY soon, and we'd love for you to take a first look - email me at stephanie@dynamoid.com if you'd like to join our Beta channel to try it out! Thanks again.
-Stephanie

reviews.review_title: An Powerful Tool to Explore Biology
reviews.review_description:
A profound experience.  This app brings you to impossible (but real!) places: The insides of plants, bones, blood vessels, cells, nuclei, and more.  You can actually see proteins and DNA, and  how they interact.   I'd recommend this for anyone studying high school or college Biology.  

It also has voice that asks questions about what you are seeing, and provides feedback on your answers.  Amazing.
